heroTitle: Fire-kissed Pizza with Modern Italian Soul
heroDescription: allora serves 48-hour fermented sourdough pizza crafted with premium, fresh ingredients and baked at 700°F for the perfect blistered finish.

process.title: 48-Hour Fermentation
process.description: Slow-fermented dough creates an airy crumb and deep flavor in every bite.

process.title: Premium Ingredients
process.description: San Marzano tomatoes, fresh mozzarella, basil, and cold-pressed olive oil.

process.title: 700° Wood-Fire Bake
process.description: Flash-baked to balance smoky char, crunch, and tenderness.

ctaDescription: Order pickup or delivery from allora and taste the difference of real fire, real dough, and real craft.

heroTitle: An Evening Built Around Fire, Flavor, and Hospitality
heroDescription: Step into allora trattoria for handmade pasta, flame-seared proteins, and seasonal plates served in a warm, candlelit dining room.

signatureDishes.name: Burrata Alla Brace
signatureDishes.description: Charred sourdough, roasted tomato confit, basil oil, cracked pepper.

signatureDishes.name: Cacio e Pepe
signatureDishes.description: Fresh tonnarelli, pecorino romano, black pepper bloom, lemon zest.

signatureDishes.name: Bistecca al Rosmarino
signatureDishes.description: Wood-grilled striploin, rosemary jus, crispy potatoes, grilled greens.

signatureDishes.name: Margherita Classica
signatureDishes.description: San Marzano tomato, fior di latte, basil leaves, first-press olive oil.

signatureDishes.name: Funghi Tartufo
signatureDishes.description: Wild mushrooms, truffle crema, pecorino, roasted garlic and thyme.

signatureDishes.name: Calabrese Piccante
signatureDishes.description: Spicy salami, chili oil, smoked scamorza, oregano and hot honey drizzle.

signatureDishes.name: Gnocchi al Pomodoro
signatureDishes.description: Potato gnocchi, slow-cooked tomato sugo, parmigiano, basil and lemon zest.

signatureDishes.name: Pollo al Mattone
signatureDishes.description: Brick-pressed chicken, charred lemon, rosemary potatoes and pan jus.

testimonials.quote: From the first bite to dessert, every course felt intentional and unforgettable.
The room, the staff, and the food all deliver a true modern Italian restaurant night.
The truffle pizza and the service were both world-class.
Beautiful atmosphere, and every plate came out hot and perfectly timed.

reservationDescription: Open nightly from 5 PM to 11 PM. Book ahead for chef counter seating and weekend tasting menus.
